title: Daily Source Pass
summary: Today's issue is built from public sources plus a supervised Facebook New posts capture: AP/Sportsnet, Visit Music City, Metro Council Legistar, Rules Committee records, East Nashville Farmers Market, Nashville Public Library, NWS Nashville, and Facebook group screenshots.

stages.name: Official Records And Local Web Sweep
stages.goal: Find the high-confidence public items before the neighborhood starts arguing from memory.
stages.output: Published Super Bowl/East Bank, Council utility, and NES/tree-moratorium watch items from public records and reported sources.

stages.name: Direct Pages And Utility Sweep
stages.goal: Add the same-day things people can actually use.
stages.output: Published the farmers market/weather practical and used East Branch hours as backup utility context.

stages.name: Community Capture Lane
stages.goal: Bring Facebook and Nextdoor in only when editor-selected screenshots or post notes are available.
stages.output: Facebook New posts capture completed and split into individual screenshot-forward stories, with the original notebook retained as a hub. Nextdoor remains waiting on a working selected feed.

stages.name: Publish Pack
stages.goal: Ship the source-backed stories, media packs, maps, source trails, and social cuts.
stages.output: Nine May 19 stories are live, including three individual Facebook-captured stories, the Facebook hub, Google Places images, maps, source trails, and social copy.

publishQueue.decision: Published as an individual local-commerce note with Facebook screenshot context.
publishQueue.why: The bouquet post is a distinct maker/small-business signal with real images.

publishQueue.decision: Published as an individual music-calendar story with Facebook screenshot context.
publishQueue.why: The flyer has a lineup, cover, venue, and date that should not be buried in a roundup.

publishQueue.decision: Published as an individual event story with Facebook screenshot context.
publishQueue.why: The clothing swap/listening party has a clear time, place, flyer, and reader use.

publishQueue.decision: Published as a screenshot-forward neighborhood notebook.
publishQueue.why: The supervised New posts pass found useful public-facing events and local commerce while skipping sensitive private items.

publishQueue.decision: Published as today's source issue lead.
publishQueue.why: It explains what was found, what was published, and why private-platform claims need selected screenshots before promotion.

publishQueue.decision: Published as the East Bank/Super Bowl lead.
publishQueue.why: The Super Bowl vote turns East Bank planning into immediate local-news infrastructure, not just future sports trivia.

publishQueue.decision: Published as the Council packet brief.
publishQueue.why: Gallatin sidewalk money, Shelby Park buses, NES politics, and East Bank Authority appointments are concrete civic signals.

publishQueue.decision: Published as the NES/tree-trimming watch item.
publishQueue.why: The post-storm utility fight has moved into vegetation management, which East Nashville residents will feel block by block.

publishQueue.decision: Published as a practical market/weather item.
publishQueue.why: Direct-source hours, location, parking, weather, and a dry backup make this useful right now.
The policy now supports visible screenshots, but only after the editor supplies or opens the specific posts to capture.

publishQueue.decision: Ready for editor-selected screenshots or pasted notes.
publishQueue.why: Nextdoor can add texture, but this run did not have a working selected-post capture.

accessNeeds.name: Facebook private group
accessNeeds.today: New posts pass completed and published as a Facebook notebook. Keep using this lane when the editor opens the group.
accessNeeds.guardrail: Screenshot-forward is fine; hard-redact kids, medical/financial details, private addresses, phones, plates, and unverified private-person accusations.

accessNeeds.name: Nextdoor
accessNeeds.today: Open the feed or paste selected notes. Use it for patterns, service complaints, lost-and-found, and neighborhood questions.
accessNeeds.guardrail: Do not publish private accusations as fact without public records, named sources, or multiple credible confirmations.

accessNeeds.name: Public official and local web sources
accessNeeds.today: Recheck Legistar action details after Council/committee actions post and update the May 19 Council/NES stories if votes change the status.
accessNeeds.guardrail: Agenda language means under consideration; action details or minutes mean acted on.

accessNeeds.name: Weather and event utility
accessNeeds.today: Refresh NWS and event pages before an evening newsletter or push if the radar changes.
accessNeeds.guardrail: Weather is time-sensitive; source-note the update window.
